channel.title: Media on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in Media on Drupal WxT

item.title: Media Library - Images, Videos and Documents (D7)
item.description: Library Basics a) To access the library from the admin menu click on Content and then Files /en/admin/content/file, or you can also click the Add Media button in the WYSIWYG to access the library b) Avoid creating unnecessary duplicates. Whenever possible re-use the images, videos and documents that have already been uploaded to the library. Browsing the Library a) Using the file admin page /en/admin/content/file you can search by Name, Type of multimedia, and User who uploaded the file.
